title: tanacetum gilliatii
intro: Tanacetum gilliatii, also known as mountain tansy or Gilliat's tansy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Tanacetum gilliatii include its ability to act as a natural antacid, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Tanacetum gilliatii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
